title: (Pack of 2) - 140g Lemon Cheesecake Scented Candle in Glass Jar – Aromatherapy Fragrance Candle with Essential Oils, Long Lasting Slow Burning Candle for Home Fragrance & Relaxation.
features: 🍋 𝐃𝐄𝐋𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐎𝐔𝐒 𝐋𝐄𝐌𝐎𝐍 𝐂𝐇𝐄𝐄𝐒𝐄𝐂𝐀𝐊𝐄 𝐅𝐑𝐀𝐆𝐑𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄 – Fill Your Home with the Irresistible Aroma of Sweet, Creamy Cheesecake Blended with Zesty Lemon Notes. This Scented Candle Creates a Warm, Uplifting and Indulgent Atmosphere Perfect for Any Room.

🕯️𝐋𝐎𝐍𝐆 𝐋𝐀𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 & 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍 𝐁𝐔𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 – Enjoy Hours of Consistent Fragrance Thanks to the High-Quality Chunky Wax Blend and Natural Cotton Wick. Designed for an Even Burn That Releases a Steady Scent Without Overpowering Your Space.

🏡 𝐄𝐋𝐄𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐆𝐋𝐀𝐒𝐒 𝐉𝐀𝐑 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍 – Presented in a Stylish Reusable Glass Jar, This 140g Candle Complements Any Home Décor. Ideal for Living Rooms, Bedrooms, Bathrooms or Offices – Adding Both Beauty and Fragrance to Your Surroundings.

🌿 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐔𝐒𝐄𝐃 𝐖𝐈𝐓𝐇 𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐎𝐈𝐋𝐒 – Crafted with a Unique Blend of Fragrance Oils and Essential Oils to Enhance Your Relaxation and Mood. Perfect for Aromatherapy, Meditation, or Simply Unwinding After a Long Day.

🎁 𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐄𝐂𝐓 𝐆𝐈𝐅𝐓 𝐈𝐃𝐄𝐀 – A Thoughtful Treat for Any Candle Lover! This Lemon Cheesecake Candle Makes a Delightful Gift for Birthdays, Housewarmings, Mother’s Day, Christmas, or as a Self-Care Indulgence.
description: Indulge Your Senses with the Mouth-Watering Aroma of Lemon Cheesecake Fragranced Candle — a Chunky Wax Candle That Perfectly Blends Zesty Lemon Freshness with the Creamy Sweetness of Baked Cheesecake. Hand-Poured into a Stylish Reusable Glass Jar, This 140g Scented Candle Adds a Touch of Luxury to Any Space. Whether You’re Enjoying a Quiet Evening at Home, Taking a Relaxing Bath, or Setting the Mood for Guests, Its Long-Lasting Fragrance Fills the Room with a Comforting, Dessert-Inspired Scent That Feels Warm, Welcoming, and Utterly Irresistible. Crafted with Premium Fragrance Oils and Essential Oils, This Candle Is Designed for a Slow, Even Burn That Delivers Hours of Consistent Scent Release. the Natural Cotton Wick Ensures a Clean, Smoke-Free Burn While Enhancing the Fragrance Throw for a Rich, Balanced Aroma. Ideal for Aromatherapy, Relaxation, or Gifting, the Lemon Cheesecake Candle Makes a Delightful Addition to Your Home Décor or a Thoughtful Present for Friends and Family. Its Refreshing, Bakery-Style Scent Helps Uplift the Mood and Create a Cosy, Comforting Atmosphere — Perfect for Any Occasion.
